name: Automated Expense Management - Discord Receipt RPA Prototype

parameters.content:
Expected POST body from your Discord bot:

{
  "discordUser": "Paul Krus",
  "discordUserId": "123456789",
  "messageTimestamp": "2026-05-25T14:14:34.000Z",
  "submittedDate": "2026-05-25",
  "messageId": "discord-message-id",
  "channelId": "discord-channel-id",
  "imageBase64": "base64_receipt_image_here",
  "mimeType": "image/jpeg"
}

The bot should convert the Discord attachment image to base64 before sending it to this webhook.

Set these in your n8n environment/config:

LLM_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1   (any OpenAI-compatible endpoint)
LLM_API_KEY=your_key
LLM_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini                    (must be a vision-capable model)
DISCORD_LOG_WEBHOOK_URL=https://discord.com/api/webhooks/...
DISCORD_ACCOUNTANT_ROLE_ID=your_role_id
GOOGLE_SHEETS_SPREADSHEET_ID=your_google_sheet_id
GOOGLE_SHEETS_SHEET_NAME=Expenses
MONGO_LOG_COLLECTION=workflow_logs

MongoDB credential in n8n should point to mongodb://admin:password@mongo:27017/expense_rpa?authSource=admin

Google Sheets credential: create a Google Sheets OAuth2 API credential in n8n and attach it to the two 'Sheets Append' nodes.

Sheet column order must match rowValues order in the Code node.

Recommended Google Sheets columns (header row in this exact order):

SubmittedDate | MessageTimestamp | DiscordUser | DiscordUserId | ReceiptId | Merchant | ReceiptDate | Category | Currency | TotalAmount | VATAmount | PaymentMethod | BusinessPurpose | Status | Details | Confidence | MessageId

This supports monthly budget reports, pivot tables and charts later without changing the n8n flow.

parameters.jsCode:
const source = $json;

return [
  {
    json: {
      eventType: "SubmissionReceived",
      status: source.status || 'Received',
      details: source.details || '',
      discordUser: source.discordUser || '',
      discordUserId: source.discordUserId || '',
      messageId: source.messageId || '',
      channelId: source.channelId || '',
      messageTimestamp: source.messageTimestamp || '',
      submittedDate: source.submittedDate || '',
      receiptDetected: source.receiptDetected ?? null,
      hasMissingFields: source.hasMissingFields ?? null,
      missingFields: source.missingFields || source.inputMissingFields || [],
      merchant: source.merchant || '',
      receiptDate: source.receiptDate || '',
      category: source.category || '',
      currency: source.currency || '',
      totalAmount: source.totalAmount || '',
      vatAmount: source.vatAmount || '',
      confidence: source.confidence || '',
      logSource: 'n8n',
      workflowName: 'Automated Expense Management - Discord Receipt RPA Prototype',
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  }
];

parameters.content:
MongoDB logging added:

The workflow now writes operational log events to MongoDB as side branches, so logging does not break the main expense flow.

Logged events include:
- SubmissionReceived
- AIUnavailable
- AIResponseReceived
- NoReceiptRegistered
- MissingFields / PendingReview
- Success / WroteToSheet

Configure a MongoDB credential in n8n that connects to the Docker Mongo service.

meta.description: Prototype n8n workflow for Discord receipt submission, OpenAI-compatible LLM extraction, validation, Google Sheets append, MongoDB logging, and Discord notifications.
